# 025.01 ‚Äî Dedicated "5. Video" tab + auto-generated title / description / thumbnail / tags ‚Äî PLAN

## Summary / approach

Two deliverables, best kept independent so each ships and tests on its own:

- **A ‚Äî UI reorganization (pure Qt, no new logic):** lift the entire `Xu·∫•t video ‚Ä¶` group out of `AudioTab` into a new `VideoTab(QWidget)` that owns its *own* project picker, voice source, and status/progress/cancel widgets, then register it as `"5. Video"` in `Workspace` (6 wiring spots + the tab tuples). No render-pipeline changes.
- **B ‚Äî On-disk metadata generation (pure builders + Pillow + one worker hook):** add pure, unit-testable `build_upload_title` / `build_video_description` / `render_thumbnail` builders, thread the part number `N` and per-chapter timestamps through `VideoWorker`, and write `<out>.title.txt` / `<out>.txt` / `<out>.jpg` next to each `.mp4`. Explicitly **no** YouTube OAuth / upload.
- **C ‚Äî Auto-generated tags (Phase G):** a novel-level YouTube tag list produced by an **LLM engine** (the CLI Agent / LM Studio / Claude engines from "2. D·ªãch", via a new `complete(prompt)` capability on those engines). Pure `parse_tags` enforces YouTube's 500-char budget; tags persist on `NovelMeta.tags` and are written to `<out>.tags.txt` per part. Google Translate is excluded (can't generate).

The codebase already has a strong "pure builder vs. ffmpeg/Pillow I/O" split (`tts/video.py` builders are pure; `tts/player_skin.py` does Pillow; tests cover only the pure parts). We follow that exactly: the new description/title builders live beside `build_youtube_description` and are covered by `tests/test_video.py`-style pure tests; the thumbnail is a Pillow renderer tested only for "writes a correct-size file", mirroring `TestPlayerSkin`.

## Decisions on the open questions

1. **Vietnamese author source (the `translated_author` gap).**
   Recommend: **add `translated_author: str = ""` to `NovelMeta`**, persist it via an extended `save_meta_translation(...)`, and **opportunistically populate it in `TranslateWorker`** where the meta title/description are already translated (translate the author string in the same `translate_chapter` call, or run it through `apply_glossary` for the H√°n-Vi·ªát reading). This is a one-line extension of an existing code path and costs nothing at video time.
   *Fallback in the builder:* if `translated_author` is empty, emit the `T√°c gi·∫£:` line with the original author only (drop the trailing `"‚Ä¶"` VN clause) rather than printing empty quotes. This keeps old projects (translated before this field existed) clean. `NovelMeta.from_dict` already filters unknown keys, so adding the field is backward-safe for existing `meta.json` files.

2. **Part number N + per-chapter timestamps into the builders.**
   Recommend: **generate metadata inside `VideoWorker.run`, not inside `render_video`.** The worker already owns `enumerate(windows)` (so `N = i + 1`, matching the `{first:04d}-{last:04d}` file naming), the `MergeWindow`, and the `segments` list. It calls `_with_real_durations(segments)` (exported from `tts/video`) once to get accurate durations, then calls the pure `build_video_description(segments, meta, part_num, total_chapters)` and writes the files after `render_video` returns `file_done`. This keeps `render_video` unchanged for the metadata part and keeps the builders pure (no ffmpeg inside them). The description's chapter table therefore uses the *same* real durations the video was timed with.
   *Note:* `render_video` currently writes its own `<out>.txt` YouTube description. We **replace** that write path: `render_video` keeps writing the simple `.txt` for the `all`/`range`/single case, but in batch we overwrite `<out>.txt` with the richer feature-025 description (see Decision 4). Cleaner: move the `.txt` write out of `render_video` entirely into the worker so there is one owner. Recommend the latter (single writer in the worker) ‚Äî but guard the existing `TestRealRender.test_renders_mp4_with_audio_and_description` which asserts `render_video` writes `<out>.txt`; either keep a minimal `.txt` write in `render_video` or update that test. **Recommend keeping the `render_video` `.txt` write as-is and having the worker overwrite it in every mode** (least test churn, richer output everywhere ‚Äî see Decision 4).

3. **Thumbnail: Pillow vs. ffmpeg; the decorative glow font.**
   Recommend: **pure Pillow** (`render_thumbnail`), reusing `player_skin.py` helpers (`_cover_fit`, `_rounded_mask`, `GaussianBlur`, `_vertical_gradient`). The ffmpeg preview renderer produces the *music-player* composition, which is the wrong layout for a YouTube thumbnail (we want a full-bleed cover + big title + `PH·∫¶N N`). Pillow gives pixel control over multi-line text, stroke, and glow, and is already a dependency.
   *Glow font:* **do not bundle a new display font** in the first pass. Approximate the "decorative glow" with an existing feature-023 bundled font (recommend `PlayfairDisplay-Regular.ttf` for the serif title, or reuse the user's chosen `video_font`) plus a **Pillow glow = a blurred, dilated copy of the text in an accent colour composited under a white stroked title** (`ImageDraw.text(..., stroke_width=‚Ä¶, stroke_fill=‚Ä¶)` for the crisp edge; a `GaussianBlur`'d duplicate for the glow). This ships without new packaging work. Bundling a dedicated display font (e.g. a decorative OFL face) is a **follow-up** (Phase E) if the glow-approximation isn't punchy enough ‚Äî it then needs the package-data + spec entry.

4. **Batch-only vs. all/range.**
   Prompt says batch. Recommend: **generate title + description + thumbnail in ALL modes** (all / range / batch), with `N` = window index + 1 and the file naming already distinguishing single vs. windowed output. Rationale: the machinery is identical per window, the "part N" concept degrades gracefully (a single `all` video is "Ph·∫ßn 1", or we special-case the single-window `all` case to omit "Ph·∫ßn N" from the title ‚Äî see below). This avoids a confusing "metadata only appears in batch" cliff and matches how `render_video` already writes a `.txt` in every mode.
   *Title special-case:* when there is exactly one window in `all` mode (`total == 1 and mode == "all"`), emit the title **without** `- Ph·∫ßn {N}` (it's the whole novel). Otherwise `‚Ä¶ - Ph·∫ßn {N}`.

5. **VideoTab's own project selection + voice.**
   Recommend: VideoTab is a **full sibling** with its own `ProjectPicker` (`self.picker`), its own `TtsVoicesWorker`-loaded `voice_combo`, and its own `status_label` / `progress` / `cancel_button`. It participates in the same `state.touch_project` recency wiring as the other non-scrape tabs (so selecting a novel in Video updates recency), and `Workspace._on_scrape_project` / `reopen_last_project` refresh its picker like the others. The video worker reads *its own* `voice_combo` to decide which per-chapter audio to render. This matches every other tab's contract (`.picker`, `.refresh_projects`, `.has_running_workers`, `.shutdown`) and needs no cross-tab coupling.

---

## Phase A ‚Äî Extract `VideoTab` (pure UI reorganization)

**New file: `src/noveltrans/gui/tab_video.py` ‚Äî `class VideoTab(QWidget)` ("Tab 5 ‚Äî Video").**
Move from `AudioTab` (delete the originals there):
- Members: `_video_worker`, `_preview_worker`.
- `_build_video_box()` (audio.py ~247‚Äì333) ‚Äî becomes the tab's main content (promote the group's controls to the tab's top-level layout; keep the `QGroupBox` framing if desired).
- Handlers: `_on_video_mode_changed`, `_on_video_quality_changed`, `_on_video_font_changed`, `_pick_video_image`, `_start_preview`, `_on_preview_ready`, `_on_preview_failed`, `_start_video`, `_on_video_progress`, `_on_video_file_done`, `_reset_video_ui`, `_on_video_finished`, `_on_video_failed`, `_open_video_dir`.
- Give VideoTab its **own** widgets that the moved handlers reference (currently AudioTab's shared ones): `self.picker` (ProjectPicker), `self.voice_combo` (+ `_load_voices`/`_on_voices_listed` copied from AudioTab, reusing `TtsVoicesWorker`), `self.status_label`, `self.progress`, and a `self.cancel_button` (the moved handlers use `self.generate_button`/`self.cancel_button` ‚Äî replace `generate_button` references with the tab's own preview/video buttons in `_reset_video_ui`, and use a dedicated `cancel_button` wired to a new `_cancel` that cancels `_video_worker`/`_preview_worker`).
- Add the standard tab contract methods: `refresh_projects(select_path="")`, `showEvent` (refresh when idle), `_on_project_selected` (open project, set `video_range_to` default to `counts()["total"]`), `has_running_workers()` (video worker running), `shutdown()` (cancel+wait video + preview + voices workers). Model these on AudioTab's versions.
- Keep the `Xem tr∆∞·ªõc` / `T·∫°o video` / `M·ªü th∆∞ m·ª•c video` buttons; the tab needs no chapter table (it operates on windows).

**Modify `src/noveltrans/gui/tab_audio.py`:** remove all the video members/handlers listed above; drop `video_box = self._build_video_box()` and its `layout.addWidget(video_box)`; remove `_open_video_dir`, `_video_worker`, `_preview_worker`; trim `_cancel`, `has_running_workers`, `shutdown` to no longer reference the video/preview workers; update `_start_merge`'s `_reset_merge_ui` etc. (audio-only now); remove now-unused imports (`VideoPreviewWorker`, `VideoWorker`, `QPixmap` if only used by preview ‚Äî verify). Update the docstring "Tab 4 ‚Äî Audio" to reflect TTS + merge only.

**Modify `src/noveltrans/gui/workspace.py` (the 6 wiring spots + tuples):**
1. Import `from noveltrans.gui.tab_video import VideoTab`.
2. `self.video_tab = VideoTab(config)` after `self.audio_tab`.
3. `self.tabs.addTab(self.video_tab, "5. Video")`.
4. `self.video_tab.picker.project_selected.connect(self.state.touch_project)`.
5. `populate_lists()` tuple ‚Äî add `self.video_tab`.
6. `_on_scrape_project` ‚Äî add `self.video_tab.refresh_projects(path)`.
7. `reopen_last_project` ‚Äî add `self.video_tab.refresh_projects(select_path=last)`.
8. `has_running_workers` tuple ‚Äî add `self.video_tab`.
9. `shutdown` tuple ‚Äî add `self.video_tab`.

**Verify `src/noveltrans/gui/main_window.py`:** it hosts workspaces in the outer tab bar and does not reference inner tabs by name ‚Äî confirm no change needed (grep for `audio_tab`/`inner`; expected: none).

*Unit-testable in Phase A:* nothing pure (all Qt). Add a light `qapp` smoke test that `VideoTab(config)` constructs and exposes `.picker`, `.refresh_projects`, `.has_running_workers`, `.shutdown` (mirrors `test_tab_audio_preview.py` style), and that `Workspace` now has 5 tabs.

---

## Phase B ‚Äî Metadata builders (pure, testable)

**Modify `src/noveltrans/models.py`:** add `translated_author: str = ""` to `NovelMeta` (after `translated_title`). `from_dict` already filters unknown keys ‚Üí old `meta.json` loads fine.

**Modify `src/noveltrans/storage/project.py`:** extend `save_meta_translation` to accept and persist the author, e.g. `save_meta_translation(self, title, description, lang, author="")` ‚Äî set `self.meta.translated_author = author` and `data.update(translated_author=author)`. Keep the param optional so existing callers (identity passthrough at workers.py:143) stay valid; pass `project.meta.author` there so the identity/Vietnamese-source path fills it too.

**Modify `src/noveltrans/gui/workers.py` (`TranslateWorker.run`, ~211‚Äì220):** when translating the meta, also produce a Vietnamese author (translate `project.meta.author` in the same call or via `apply_glossary` for H√°n-Vi·ªát) and pass it to `save_meta_translation(meta_title, meta_desc, self.target_lang, meta_author)`. Non-fatal (already wrapped in `try/except`).

**Metadata builders ‚Äî add to `src/noveltrans/tts/video.py`** (keep them beside `build_youtube_description`; reuse the existing `_yt_timestamp`, do not duplicate it):

- `build_upload_title(vn_title: str, part_num: int | None) -> str`
  Returns `f"{vn_title} - Ph·∫ßn {part_num}"`, or just `vn_title` when `part_num is None` (single/whole-novel).

- `build_video_description(segments, *, original_title, vn_title, original_author, vn_author, total_chapters, credit="Fox Novel") -> str`
  Emits EXACTLY:
  ```
  T√™n truy·ªán: {original_title} ‚Äî "{vn_title}"
  T√°c gi·∫£: {original_author} "{vn_author}"     ‚Üê if vn_author empty: T√°c gi·∫£: {original_author}
  S·ªë ch∆∞∆°ng: {total_chapters}

  M·ª•c l·ª•c ch∆∞∆°ng:
  0:00 {seg[0].title}
  5:51 {seg[1].title}
  ...

  T·∫°o b·ªüi: {credit}
  ```
  Chapter lines built by cumulative `sum(s.seconds)` ‚Üí `_yt_timestamp(start)` (already yields `M:SS` and `H:MM:SS`). First line is always `0:00`. Segments must already carry real durations (worker calls `_with_real_durations` first). Trailing `T·∫°o b·ªüi: {credit}` line.

*Rationale for placing in `video.py`:* the file already houses the pure description builder and `_yt_timestamp`; `tests/test_video.py` already imports from there. A separate `tts/metadata.py` is also fine but adds an import hop for zero benefit ‚Äî recommend keeping them in `video.py` unless it grows too large.

*Unit-testable (add to `tests/test_video.py`):*
- `build_upload_title`: `"X - Ph·∫ßn 3"`; `part_num=None` ‚Üí `"X"`.
- `build_video_description`: exact header shape; first timestamp `0:00`; a `>1h` part yields an `H:MM:SS` line; empty `vn_author` ‚Üí no trailing quotes on the `T√°c gi·∫£:` line; `S·ªë ch∆∞∆°ng:` equals passed `total_chapters` (whole novel, not the part); ends with `T·∫°o b·ªüi: Fox Novel`; one timestamp line per segment.

---

## Phase C ‚Äî Thumbnail (Pillow)

**New: `render_thumbnail(...)` in `src/noveltrans/tts/player_skin.py`** (it already owns the Pillow helpers; keeps all image I/O in one module), or a new `src/noveltrans/tts/thumbnail.py` importing those helpers (recommend the latter for separation, importing `_cover_fit`, `_rounded_mask`, `_vertical_gradient`, `GaussianBlur`). Signature:
```
render_thumbnail(base_image_path, out_path, *, vn_title, part_num, tagline,
                 font_path, width=1280, height=720) -> Path
```
Composition:
- Full-bleed `_cover_fit(base, 1280, 720)` background; optional dark bottom‚Üítop gradient scrim (reuse `_vertical_gradient`) so text reads on any photo.
- **Top-left:** VN novel title, word-wrapped to N lines, in the decorative/glow style ‚Äî draw a blurred accent-colour copy (glow) + a white `stroke_width` title on top (`ImageDraw.text` with `stroke_fill`). Font from `font_path` (the tab's chosen `video_font` TTF, resolved via `font_dir_context()` + the `VIDEO_FONTS[key]["file"]`).
- **Bottom-center:** `PH·∫¶N {N}` large, centered, plus a smaller tagline subtitle line beneath it (from the tab's tagline field / config default).
- Save as JPEG quality ~85 (`.jpg`) to stay ‚â§2 MB at 1280√ó720, or PNG if `out_path` ends `.png`.
- Wrap-helper: a pure `_wrap_title(text, font, max_width) -> list[str]` (unit-testable without rendering a full image).

**VideoTab additions (Phase A file):** a base-image picker (`thumbnail_image_edit` + `Ch·ªçn ·∫£nh‚Ä¶`) and a tagline `QLineEdit`, both persisted via new config (Phase-D config keys). If a separate thumbnail base image isn't provided, fall back to the video background image.

*Unit-testable (add to `tests/test_video.py` or a new `test_thumbnail.py`, mirroring `TestPlayerSkin`):*
- `_wrap_title` splits long titles at word boundaries within the width budget.
- `render_thumbnail` writes a file of exactly `(1280, 720)`, mode as expected, and `st_size <= 2_000_000`.
- Unreadable base image ‚Üí still produces a valid thumbnail (placeholder), mirroring `test_unreadable_photo_still_produces_a_skin`.

---

## Phase D ‚Äî Wire generation into the batch render

**Modify `src/noveltrans/gui/workers.py` (`VideoWorker.run`, ~807‚Äì842):** inside the `for i, window in enumerate(windows)` loop, after `render_video(...)` succeeds and before `file_done.emit`:
- `part_num = None if (total == 1 and self.mode == "all") else (i + 1)`.
- Compute real-duration segments once for metadata: `timed = _with_real_durations(segments)` (import from `tts.video`). (`render_video` also probes internally; acceptable duplicate ‚Äî or refactor `render_video` to accept pre-timed segments as a follow-up. Recommend the simple duplicate probe now.)
- `title = build_upload_title(novel_title, part_num)` ‚Üí write `out_path.with_suffix(".title.txt")`.
- `desc = build_video_description(timed, original_title=project.meta.title, vn_title=novel_title, original_author=project.meta.author, vn_author=project.meta.translated_author, total_chapters=project.counts()["total"], credit=self.credit)` ‚Üí write `out_path.with_suffix(".txt")` (overwrites the simple one `render_video` wrote ‚Äî richer everywhere).
- `render_thumbnail(self.thumb_image_path or self.image_path, out_path.with_suffix(".jpg"), vn_title=novel_title, part_num=(part_num or 1), tagline=self.tagline, font_path=<resolved TTF>, width=1280, height=720)`.
- Pass the new inputs into `VideoWorker.__init__`: `credit`, `tagline`, `thumb_image_path`, and the chosen font *key* (to resolve the TTF file for the thumbnail). Wire these from `VideoTab._start_video`.
- Keep all writes inside the existing `try/except TtsError` so a metadata failure surfaces via `failed` rather than crashing the loop; consider a narrower guard so a thumbnail failure doesn't discard a successfully-rendered mp4 (log/skip thumbnail, still emit `file_done`).

**Update the finished-status string** in `VideoTab._on_video_finished` (moved from audio) to mention title/description/thumbnail, e.g. `"‚úÖ ƒê√£ t·∫°o {count} video (k√®m ti√™u ƒë·ªÅ, m√¥ t·∫£, ·∫£nh b√¨a)‚Ä¶"`.

*Decision recap:* generates in **all modes**; `Ph·∫ßn N` omitted only for the single whole-novel `all` video.

---

## Phase G ‚Äî Auto-generated tags (LLM via the "2. D·ªãch" engines)

Tags are semantic (genre inference, title variants, no-diacritic variants) so they need an
LLM, not a template. They are **novel-level** (one set reused for every part). Reuse the
existing translator-engine infrastructure exactly as "2. D·ªãch" does.

### G1 ‚Äî Give the LLM engines a general `complete(prompt)` capability
The `Translator` ABC currently only exposes `translate()`, whose prompts hard-wrap the input
in *translation* instructions ‚Äî unusable for tag generation. Refactor the three LLM engines to
expose a raw completion, with `translate()` delegating to it:
- **`src/noveltrans/translators/cli_agent.py`** ‚Äî extract the subprocess call into
  `complete(prompt: str) -> str` (the current body of `translate` minus the `_PROMPT.format`);
  `translate()` builds the translation prompt then calls `complete()`.
- **`src/noveltrans/translators/lmstudio.py`** ‚Äî add `complete(prompt, *, system="")` doing the
  `/v1/chat/completions` POST (+ the `<think>`-strip); `translate()` calls it with the
  translation system prompt.
- **`src/noveltrans/translators/claude.py`** ‚Äî add `complete(prompt, *, system="")` doing the
  `messages.create`; `translate()` calls it.
- **`src/noveltrans/translators/base.py`** ‚Äî declare `complete(self, prompt, *, system="") ->
  str` raising `NotImplementedError` by default, plus a `can_generate_tags` class attr (True on
  the three LLM engines, False on `GoogleFreeTranslator`). Google can't generate ‚Üí tags are
  disabled for it (matches "CLI Agent and LM Studio").

This refactor is behaviour-preserving for `translate()` (guard with the existing engine tests).

### G2 ‚Äî Pure tag builders (testable, no network)
New `src/noveltrans/tts/tags.py` (or a `tags` section in a shared metadata module):
- `build_tags_prompt(*, vn_title, original_title, author, vn_description) -> str` ‚Äî a Vietnamese
  instruction asking for ~18‚Äì25 YouTube tags: the VN title + variants (WITH and WITHOUT
  diacritics ‚Äî explicitly request a no-d·∫•u variant like `nguoi hau phan dien xuyen sach`),
  `truy·ªán ch·ªØ ‚Ä¶` / `ti·ªÉu thuy·∫øt ‚Ä¶` variants, genre/theme tags, and format tags (`truy·ªán audio`,
  `truy·ªán d·ªãch`, `review truy·ªán`, `t√≥m t·∫Øt truy·ªán`, ‚Ä¶); output a single comma-separated line,
  no numbering, no preamble.
- `parse_tags(raw, *, max_total_chars=500) -> list[str]` ‚Äî split on commas/newlines, strip,
  drop empties and leading `#`, dedupe case-insensitively (preserving first-seen order), then
  enforce YouTube's budget: a tag is billed as `len(tag)` plus **+2 when it contains a space**
  (YouTube quotes multi-word tags ‚Äî this is why the reference reads `405/500`); trim from the
  end until the running total ‚â§ `max_total_chars`. Returns the kept tags.
- `format_tags(tags) -> str` ‚Äî join with `, ` for the `.tags.txt` file and the editable field.

*Unit-testable:* `parse_tags` dedup + the space‚Üí+2 budget math + trimming to ‚â§500; the prompt
builder includes the title and a no-diacritic instruction. (LLM output itself is not unit-tested.)

### G3 ‚Äî Persist + worker
- **`src/noveltrans/models.py`** ‚Äî add `tags: str = ""` to `NovelMeta` (comma-joined, YouTube
  paste format). Backward-safe (`from_dict` filters unknown keys).
- **`src/noveltrans/storage/project.py`** ‚Äî a `save_tags(self, tags: str)` that writes
  `self.meta.tags` + meta.json (mirrors `save_meta_translation`).
- **`src/noveltrans/gui/workers.py`** ‚Äî a `TagsWorker(QThread)` taking the SAME engine params as
  `TranslateWorker` (`engine_name`, `api_key`, `model`, `cli_command`, `base_url`); builds the
  prompt from `project.meta`, calls `translator.complete(...)`, `parse_tags(...)`, `save_tags(...)`;
  signals `finished_ok(str tags)` / `failed(str)`. Register with `track_worker(...)`. Guard the
  engine with `can_generate_tags` ‚Üí a clear Vietnamese error if Google is selected.

### G4 ‚Äî Video tab UI + wiring
- **`src/noveltrans/gui/tab_video.py`** ‚Äî add a compact **engine + model picker restricted to
  LLM engines** (`cli`, `claude_cli`, `claude`, `lmstudio`), defaulting to `config.translator`
  when it's an LLM else `cli` (reuse `translator_labels`, the LM Studio URL/model box pattern,
  and `CliModelsWorker`/`LmStudioModelsWorker` from the translate tab). A **"T·∫°o tags"** button
  runs `TagsWorker`; an editable `QPlainTextEdit` shows/edits the current `meta.tags`.
- **Batch render:** at the start of a batch, if `meta.tags` is empty, auto-run tag generation
  once (confirmed: auto-on-empty + the manual "T·∫°o tags" button). Then in
  `VideoWorker.run`, write the novel-level tags to `out_path.with_suffix(".tags.txt")` for every
  part (same content each time). Pass the tags string into `VideoWorker.__init__` (read from
  `meta.tags` at worker start ‚Äî no engine call inside the video worker; generation is separate).

### G5 ‚Äî Tests
- `parse_tags`: dedup, the `+2`-for-space budget, trimming to ‚â§500 chars, order preserved.
- `build_tags_prompt`: contains the VN title + a no-diacritic instruction + the format-tag hints.
- `NovelMeta.tags` round-trip + `save_tags` persists to meta.json.
- Engine refactor: `complete()` exists on the three LLM engines; `GoogleFreeTranslator.can_generate_tags is False`; `translate()` still returns the same shape (mock/`responses`).

---

## Phase E ‚Äî Packaging (only if a new display font is bundled)

Only needed if Phase C's glow-approximation is rejected in favour of a dedicated decorative TTF:
- Drop the OFL font + its license `.txt` into `src/noveltrans/tts/assets/`.
- `pyproject.toml [tool.setuptools.package-data]` already globs `tts/assets/*.ttf` / `*.txt` / `*.png` (line 55) ‚Üí no change needed for a new `.ttf`/`.txt`.
- `packaging/NovelTrans.spec` uses `collect_data_files("noveltrans")` (line 4) ‚Üí picks up package-data automatically; verify the new asset appears in the frozen bundle. Add a test asserting the font file is bundled and its family name (mirror `test_every_font_file_is_bundled` / `test_font_family_matches_and_covers_vietnamese`).
- If reusing an existing `VIDEO_FONTS` face (recommended default), **skip this phase entirely.**

---

## Phase F ‚Äî Tests (pure builders + light Qt smoke)

Add to `tests/test_video.py` (and optionally `tests/test_thumbnail.py`):
- **`build_video_description`:** exact multi-line shape (golden string); `0:00` first; a segment list summing past 1h renders an `H:MM:SS` line; empty `vn_author` fallback (no dangling quotes); `S·ªë ch∆∞∆°ng:` = whole-novel total (distinct from part chapter count); trailing `T·∫°o b·ªüi: Fox Novel`; one line per segment; cumulative/ascending timestamps.
- **`build_upload_title`:** `- Ph·∫ßn {N}` format; `None` ‚Üí bare title.
- **`_wrap_title`:** wraps within width budget at word boundaries; single long word doesn't crash.
- **`render_thumbnail`:** writes a `(1280,720)` file ‚â§ 2 MB; unreadable base image still yields a valid file.
- **`NovelMeta`/storage:** `translated_author` round-trips through `to_dict`/`from_dict` and `save_meta_translation(..., author=‚Ä¶)` persists to `meta.json` (extend `tests/test_storage.py`).
- **`VideoWorker`:** extend `TestVideoWorker` ‚Äî constructor carries `credit`/`tagline`/`thumb_image_path`/font key without shadowing `start`; and (with ffmpeg, `@skipif`) a real batch render writes `.mp4` + `.title.txt` + `.txt` (feature-025 shape) + `.jpg` for each window.
- **Qt smoke:** `VideoTab` constructs and exposes the tab contract; `Workspace` exposes 5 tabs and `video_tab` participates in `has_running_workers`/`shutdown` (extend `tests/test_main_window.py`).

Keep all pure-builder tests ffmpeg-free (they already are for `build_youtube_description`); guard render/thumbnail-with-ffmpeg tests with `@pytest.mark.skipif(shutil.which("ffmpeg") is None, ‚Ä¶)` as the file already does.

---

## Risks & follow-ups

- **`translated_author` is only populated on *future* translations.** Existing projects have an empty field ‚Üí the description falls back to original author only. Acceptable; a follow-up could add a "re-translate metadata" action or a small settings field to type the VN author manually. Flag for user.
- **Double duration probe:** the worker probes durations for the description and `render_video` probes again. Minor cost; a clean follow-up is to have `render_video` accept pre-timed segments.
- **`render_video` currently owns the `.txt` write** and a test asserts it (`TestRealRender.test_renders_mp4_with_audio_and_description`). Overwriting it in the worker keeps that test green; if we instead move the write out, update that test. Recommend overwrite.
- **Thumbnail glow quality:** the Pillow stroke+blur approximation may not match a true decorative display font. Phase E is the escape hatch. Needs a quick visual check by the user before deciding to bundle a font.
- **JPEG size at 1280√ó720** is comfortably ‚â§2 MB at q85 for photos; a busy base image at q95 could exceed it ‚Äî clamp quality or downscale if the test fails.
- **User-facing strings are Vietnamese**; keep all new labels/status/messages Vietnamese (`Ch·ªçn ·∫£nh b√¨a‚Ä¶`, `C√¢u tagline`, `‚úÖ ƒê√£ t·∫°o ‚Ä¶ k√®m ti√™u ƒë·ªÅ, m√¥ t·∫£, ·∫£nh b√¨a`). Long work stays in the existing `VideoWorker`/`VideoPreviewWorker` QThreads with `progress`/`failed`/`finished_ok` signals + `track_worker(...)` keep-awake (already wired; unchanged).

## Confirmed decisions (user, 2026-07-20)

- **Modes:** generate title/description/thumbnail in **all modes** (all / range / batch). The single whole-novel `all` video omits `- Ph·∫ßn N`.
- **Thumbnail font:** **approximate now** ‚Äî reuse a bundled 023 font (Playfair or the tab's chosen `video_font`) + a Pillow glow/stroke effect. No new font bundled in v1; **Phase E is skipped** unless a later visual review calls for a real display font.
- **Credit line:** **editable, default `Fox Novel`** ‚Äî store in config (`AppConfig.video_credit`, default `"Fox Novel"`), exposed as a field in the Video tab.
- **Tagline:** **editable field, empty default** ‚Äî a tagline `QLineEdit` in the Video tab (persisted via config), blank by default; feeds the `"‚Ä¶"` subtitle under `PH·∫¶N N`.

### Tags (confirmed 2026-07-20 ‚Äî see Phase G)
- **Engine:** LLM engines only (CLI Agent / Claude CLI / Claude API / LM Studio), via a new
  `complete(prompt)` capability. A **compact engine+model picker in the Video tab**, defaulting
  to `config.translator`. Google is excluded (can't generate). *Matches "like 2. D·ªãch."*
- **Scope:** novel-level (one tag set reused for every part), persisted on `NovelMeta.tags`,
  editable in the tab, written to `<out>.tags.txt` per part.
- **Generation trigger:** **auto-generate once if `meta.tags` is empty** at the start of a batch
  render, **plus** a **"T·∫°o tags"** button to (re)generate/edit anytime.

## Critical files
- `src/noveltrans/gui/tab_video.py` (new ‚Äî VideoTab: video controls + tags engine picker/button)
- `src/noveltrans/gui/tab_audio.py` (strip video controls)
- `src/noveltrans/gui/workspace.py` (register "5. Video" + 6 wiring spots)
- `src/noveltrans/gui/workers.py` (VideoWorker metadata hook + translated_author + new TagsWorker)
- `src/noveltrans/tts/video.py` (build_upload_title / build_video_description)
- `src/noveltrans/tts/player_skin.py` (render_thumbnail / Pillow helpers)
- `src/noveltrans/tts/tags.py` (new ‚Äî build_tags_prompt / parse_tags / format_tags)
- `src/noveltrans/translators/{base,cli_agent,lmstudio,claude}.py` (add `complete()` capability)
- `src/noveltrans/models.py` + `storage/project.py` (`translated_author`, `tags`, `save_tags`)
